\# Project Instructions

\#\# Purpose

Define the project-specific development rules for the Data Analytics Portfolio Platform (DAPP).

These instructions complement the global repository, architecture, coding and documentation standards.

\---

\#\# Project Vision

DAPP is a modular portfolio platform designed to publish high-quality Data Analytics, Data Science and Software Development projects.

The platform must prioritize:

\- Professional presentation.  
\- Technical quality.  
\- Scalability.  
\- Maintainability.  
\- Security.  
\- Knowledge sharing.

\---

\#\# Project as a Module (PaaM)

Every portfolio project is an independent module.

Each module must be self-contained and may include:

\- Documentation  
\- Datasets  
\- Dashboards  
\- Notebooks  
\- Source code  
\- Visualizations  
\- Images  
\- References  
\- Project metadata

Modules must not depend directly on each other.

\---

\#\# Project Consistency

Every new project should follow the same structure, navigation and visual identity.

Maintain consistency across:

\- Layout  
\- Components  
\- Documentation  
\- Metadata  
\- Navigation  
\- Visual style

\---

\#\# Project Lifecycle

Each project should progress through the following stages:

1\. Planning  
2\. Documentation  
3\. Data Collection  
4\. Data Preparation  
5\. Analysis  
6\. Visualization  
7\. Validation  
8\. Publication  
9\. Maintenance

\---

\#\# Documentation Requirements

Every published project should include:

\- Project overview  
\- Objectives  
\- Business context  
\- Methodology  
\- Technologies used  
\- Results  
\- Conclusions  
\- References

\---

\#\# Quality Standards

Before publishing a project, verify:

\- Documentation is complete.  
\- Visual consistency is maintained.  
\- Navigation works correctly.  
\- Datasets are properly documented.  
\- Code follows project standards.  
\- No confidential information is exposed.

\---

\#\# AI Collaboration

When generating project content:

\- Follow all approved documentation.  
\- Respect architectural decisions.  
\- Maintain consistency with existing modules.  
\- Reuse shared components whenever possible.

\---

\#\# Future Evolution

The project architecture must support:

\- New project categories.  
\- Additional technologies.  
\- New visualization libraries.  
\- Backend integration.  
\- Authentication.  
\- Cloud migration.  
\- Internationalization.

\---

\- DAPP-DOC-010-System\_Architecture.md  
\- DAPP-ADR-001-Technology\_Stack.md  
\- DAPP-ADR-002-Repository\_Strategy.md  
\- All approved instruction files under \`.github/instructions/\`
